message:
fix(freeze): correct post_inc/post_dec stack layout for loop conditions

The post_inc and post_dec opcodes had the wrong stack layout:
- Before: stack[sp-2] = modified, stack[sp-1] = original
- After: stack[sp-2] = original, stack[sp-1] = modified

This caused `while (length--)` patterns to check the decremented value
instead of the original value for the condition, resulting in one fewer
loop iteration than expected.

Fixes lodash _.range returning [0,1,2,null] instead of [0,1,2,3].
Lodash tests improved from 101/127 to 104/127 (82%).
